channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran still playing in World Cup 2026 despite withdrawal rumours, AFC says
item.description: Asian Football Confederation says it hasn't received any notification of Iran pulling out of upcoming World Cup.

item.title: No, MAGA is not divided on the Iran war
item.description: Trump’s supporters remain loyal, even if there are a few loud dissenting voices.

item.title: War on Iran: Can fuel rationing, remote work, short sleeves ease oil woes?
item.description: Rising oil prices amid the US-Israel war on Iran are pushing nations to readjust their energy policies.

item.title: Monastery shelters families fleeing Israeli strikes in Lebanon
item.description: Families displaced by Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon have found shelter at the Saints Peter and Paul Monastery in Qattine

item.title: In Ukraine’s Kharkiv, 20,000 children go underground to study
item.description: Subway schools provide safety as Russian assaults have killed dozens of children in Ukraine's second-largest city.

item.title: How Israel, the US and Iran deploy covert ops
item.description: Sometimes called sleeper cells, these anonymous agents employ deception to spy, sabotage or kill.

item.title: Israeli strike on Gaza police kills officers
item.description: An Israeli attack on a police vehicle in central Gaza has killed eight officers including a senior police official.

item.title: Map shows how 16 days of attacks have evolved in US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Here's a day-by-day breakdown of attacks, illustrating the targets hit and the weapons used since February 28.

item.title: The Iran war picture blackout
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen breaks down Planet Labs delaying the publication of its satellite imagery during an active war.

item.title: How closing the Strait of Hormuz raises your grocery bill
item.description: Closing the Strait of Hormuz raised oil prices. It also raises the cost of bread.
